prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Island). State whether it applies to England and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: This document pertains to the Environment Agency, which is a non-departmental public body in England responsible for environmental protection and regulation. Therefore, it directly applies to England as it involves public consultations and regulations specific to English environmental operations.
